description: Calculate the material quantities and costs for the bathroom renovation project, ensuring the final analysis incorporates standardized units, waste factors, and package rounding. Flag any budget overruns in the results.

natural_language.prompt: Complete the bathroom renovation materials calculator by: (1) converting all measurements to square feet, (2) filling in missing waste factors (10-15% typical), (3) calculating adjusted quantities with waste, (4) rounding up to full packages, (5) calculating costs, and (6) flagging items over budget.
